title: nelsonia brunelloides
intro: Nelsonia brunelloides, also known as Indian sage or snake root, is a plant species native to tropical regions of Asia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiviral activities. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving respiratory issues, and supporting immune function. Nelsonia brunelloides can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, and infusions for use in traditional medicine, although its effectiveness has not been extensively scientifically studied.
